name: Ubiquiti WiFi Smart Chime
title: Ubiquiti WiFi Smart Chime
short_description: Wireless Chime, paired with UniFi Protect Doorbell
description: The Ubiquiti Protect WiFi Chime (UP-Chime) is a sophisticated device designed to enhance the functionality of your home's doorbell system, specifically tailored for integration with the UniFi Protect doorbell. It is a wireless chime that can be easily plugged into a standard AC outlet, eliminating the need for a wired chime system. This makes it particularly suitable for homes that either lack a pre-existing wired chime or have one that is not compatible with their Protect doorbell.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text: Pairs with a UniFi Doorbell, Up to 80dB speaker sound, Direct plug-in to AC outlet, Wirelessly connected, Auto-Connect to UniFi WiFi, Multiple Chimes Per Doorbell)

detailed_description.heading: Convenience and Performance
detailed_description.text: The Protect WiFi Chime is designed with convenience and ease of use in mind. It automatically pairs with a UniFi Doorbell and is capable of delivering up to 80dB of speaker sound, ensuring that you never miss a visitor. It directly plugs into an AC outlet and connects wirelessly, supporting auto-connect to UniFi WiFi, with an option for third-party WiFi configuration during setup via the UniFi Protect mobile app.

detailed_description.heading: Technical Specifications
detailed_description.text: Technical specifications highlight its compact and unobtrusive design, with dimensions tailored for  EU (Ø62 x 68.3 mm) models, and a lightweight build (135 g for the EU model). The chime's enclosure is made from a combination of polycarbonate and fabric, ensuring durability and a stylish appearance. It operates on WiFi 802.11 b/g/n, with a power consumption of just 3.7W. Additional features include a built-in speaker and buzzer, LED indicators, and factory reset button. It's designed to operate in temperatures ranging from 0 to 40°C  and can withstand humidity levels from 10 to 90% non-condensing. The Protect WiFi Chime is certified by FCC, IC, and CE, underscoring its compliance with international standards.

detailed_description.heading: Conclusion
detailed_description.text: This device represents a blend of Ubiquiti's commitment to innovation, quality, and user convenience, offering a simple yet powerful solution for enhancing home security and visitor notification systems.
